info.title: Yugi Limit Regulation API
info.description: The API provides access to the Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden and Limited Lists, also known as banlists, in a JSON format. It includes lists for various formats such as the Trading Card Game (TCG), Official Card Game (OCG), Master Duel, and Rush Duel. This API is part of the YAML Yugi project and serves limit regulations published to GitHub Pages.

servers.description: Production API server hosted on GitHub Pages

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for the Yu-Gi-Oh! Trading Card Game (TCG).

200.description: Successful response with current TCG banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for the Yu-Gi-Oh! Official Card Game (OCG).

200.description: Successful response with current OCG banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for the Yu-Gi-Oh! Official Card Game Asian-English region.

200.description: Successful response with current OCG-AE banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for the Yu-Gi-Oh! Official Card Game China region.

200.description: Successful response with current OCG China banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for Yu-Gi-Oh! Rush Duel.

200.description: Successful response with current Rush Duel banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for Yu-Gi-Oh! TCG Genesys format.

200.description: Successful response with current TCG Genesys banlist

get.description: Returns the most recent effective Forbidden & Limited List for the Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel video game.

200.description: Successful response with current Master Duel banlist

LimitRegulation.description: A Forbidden & Limited List (banlist) containing card limitations for a specific Yu-Gi-Oh! format

name.description: Name or identifier of the limit regulation

effective.description: Effective date of the limit regulation in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

format.description: The game format this limit regulation applies to

forbidden.description: List of card IDs that are forbidden (cannot be used)

limited.description: List of card IDs that are limited (only 1 copy allowed)

semi_limited.description: List of card IDs that are semi-limited (only 2 copies allowed)

unlimited.description: List of card IDs that have been moved to unlimited (3 copies allowed)

tags.name: OCG
tags.description: Official Card Game (OCG) format banlists for various regions

tags.name: Master Duel
tags.description: Master Duel video game format banlists
